product_highlights: Anti-wrinkle complex peptides for cosmetic applications
Firming peptide complex for skin tightening
Melittin - bee venom derived peptide for smoothing
Decarboxy Carnosine - antioxidant and anti-glycation peptide
notes: Creative Enzymes is a US-based specialty enzyme and peptide supplier offering a comprehensive cosmetic peptide portfolio for the personal care industry. Their offerings include anti-wrinkle peptide complexes, firming peptide complexes, melittin (bee venom peptide), and decarboxy carnosine with antioxidant and anti-glycation properties. Creative Enzymes provides custom peptide synthesis services and high-purity cosmetic-grade peptide raw materials with Certificate of Analysis.
